mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM suggestion WHERE sugg_usage = 'Y'
AND sugg_answer = #{sugg_answer}
AND ( UPPER(sugg_title) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' OR UPPER(sugg_writer) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{keyword}) || '%' )
AND sugg_cdate >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND sugg_cdate < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1

SELECT sugg_no, sugg_title, sugg_content, sugg_writer, sugg_pw, sugg_answer, sugg_cdate, sugg_mdate, sugg_usage, file_origin_name, file_save_name FROM suggestion WHERE sugg_no = #{sugg_no} AND sugg_usage = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO suggestion ( sugg_no, sugg_title, sugg_content, sugg_writer, sugg_pw, sugg_answer, sugg_cdate, sugg_usage, file_origin_name, file_save_name ) VALUES ( SUGG_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{sugg_title}, #{sugg_content}, 'EMP1001', #{sugg_pw}, 'N', SYSDATE, 'Y', #{file_origin_name}, #{file_save_name} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE suggestion SET sugg_title = #{sugg_title}, sugg_content = #{sugg_content}, sugg_pw = #{sugg_pw},
file_origin_name = NULL, file_save_name = NULL,
file_origin_name = #{file_origin_name}, file_save_name = #{file_save_name},
sugg_mdate = SYSDATE WHERE sugg_no = #{sugg_no} AND sugg_usage = 'Y'
UPDATE suggestion SET sugg_usage = 'N', sugg_mdate = SYSDATE WHERE sugg_no = #{sugg_no} AND sugg_usage = 'Y'
